alyssaGraham.addDoom: Add 1 Doom to Alyssa to move card to bottom

ariadnesTwine3.moveSecretToResource: Move 1 secret from an asset you control to your resource pool, as a resource
ariadnesTwine3.moveResourceToSecret: Move 1 resource from your resource pool to an asset you control, as a secret

bloodRite.spendDealDamage: Spend Resource and Deal 1 Damage To Enemy At Your Location

armageddon.dealDamageToEnemy: Deal 1 damage to an enemy at your location

beloved.removeForAutoSuccess: Remove Beloved from the game to replace that token's effects with the following: "You automatically succeed. (Do not reveal another token. Return this token to the chaos bag after this test ends)."

blessedBlade.exhaustToAddBless: Exhaust Blessed Blade to add 1 {'{'}bless{'}'} token

armageddon4.dealDamageToEnemy: Deal 1 damage to an enemy at your location

elaborateDistraction.evadeNonElite: Automatically evade that enemy if it is not elite

eyeOfChaos.placeCharge: Place 1 Charge on Eye of Chaos

eyeOfChaos4.placeCharge: Place 1 Charge on Eye of Chaos (4)

falseSurrender.fightAgainstEnemy: Take a fight action against that enemy
falseSurrender.doNotFight: Do not take a fight action

flamethrower5.assignAmongEngaged: Assign up to 4 damage among enemies engaged with you

geas2.drawPromise: I shall not DRAW any cards during each of my turns
geas2.playPromise: I shall not PLAY any cards during each of my turns
geas2.commitPromise: I shall not COMMIT any cards during each of my turns

ghastlyRevelation.giveClues: Give any number of your clues to another investigator
ghastlyRevelation.placeClues: Place any number of your clues on any location

joeDiamond.chooseHunchCards: Choose 10 more cards for hunch deck

manipulateDestiny2.dealDamageToEnemy: Deal 2 damage to an enemy at your location
manipulateDestiny2.healDamageFromInvestigatorOrAlly: Heal 2 damage from an investigator or Ally asset at your location

minhThiPhan.doNotReturnSkill: Do not choose a skill to return to your hand

nephthysHuntressOfBast4.returnBlessForDamage: Return 3 {'{'}bless{'}'} tokens to the pool to do 2 damage to an enemy at your location

occultReliquary.choose: Choose initial slot type for Occult Reliquary

oldBookOfLore3.doNotSpendSecrets: Do not spend any secrets to play any cards

oneTwoPunch.skip: Do not fight that enemy again

patriceHathaway.shuffleDiscardKeepOne: Shuffle all but 1 card from your discard pile into your deck
patriceHathaway.chooseOneCardToLeave: Choose 1 card to leave in discard

ghastlyPossession1.placeDoomGainIcons: Place 1 doom on that asset. Ghastly Posession gains {'{'}wild{'}'}{'{'}wild{'}'}
ghastlyPossession1.removeDoomOrReplenish: If this test is successful, either remove 1 doom from that asset, or replenish half of its uses (rounded down)
ghastlyPossession1.replenishUses: Replenish half of its uses (rounded down)

grimResolve.chooseHandToSwap: Choose hand card to swap with
grimResolve.chooseUnderneathToSwap: Choose card underneath to swap with

grizzled.addToVictory: Add both the treachery and Grizzled to the victory display (Mythos-Hardened)

memoriesOfAnotherLife5.removeFromGame: Remove Memories of Another Life from the game
memoriesOfAnotherLife5.doNotRemove: Do not remove Memories of Another Life

outOfSight.disengageAndMove: Disengage from each enemy and move to a connecting location.

outOfSight3.disengageAndMove2: Disengage from each enemy and move to a revealed location up to 2 connections away.

quickWitted1.shuffleOthers: Shuffle each other Quick-Witted in your discard pile into your deck

riteOfEquilibrium5.addCurseToAddBless: Add X {'{'}curse{'}'} tokens to the chaos bag to add X {'{'}bless{'}'} tokens to the chaos bag.
riteOfEquilibrium5.removeBlessAndCurseToHeal: Remove X {'{'}curse{'}'} and X {'{'}bless{'}'} tokens from the chaos bag to heal X total horror from among cards at your location.

shroudOfShadows4.placeCharge: Place 1 Charge on Shroud of Shadows4

silassNet.returnNetWithSkills: Return Silas's Net to your hand to return all of your committed skill cards to your hand instead of discarding them

spiritSpeaker.moveChargesToResources: Move all charges to your resource pool

tommyMuldoon.moveFromTommyToAsset: Move up to 2 damage and/or horror from Tommy Muldoon to an asset you control
tommyMuldoon.moveFromAssetToTommy: Move up to 2 damage and/or horror from an asset you control to Tommy Muldoon

joeyTheRatVigil3.spendForItem: Spend 1 resource: Choose an _Item_ asset from your hand and play it (paying its cost).
joeyTheRatVigil3.discardForResources: Discard an _Item_ asset from play: Gain 2 resources.

beguile.moveAttachedEnemy: Move attached enemy to a revealed connecting location

beguile.basicEvade: Perform a basic evade action at it's location

callForBackup2.survivorOption: {'{'}survivor{'}'} card, heal 1 damage from any card

localMap.exhaustAndMove: Exhaust Local Map and move to the investigated location

secondSight5.spendChargeForClue: Spend 1 charge to discover 1 additional clue

moxie1.spendForAgility: {'{'}fast{'}'} Spend 1 resource: You get +1 {'{'}agility{'}'} for this skill test.

onTheTrail1.discoverClueBetween: Discover 1 clue at any empty location between you and the chosen enemy

protectingTheAnirniq2.returnAssetToOwner: Return that asset to its owner's hand

ravenousMyconidNurturingStrain4.searchForUncannyGrowth: Search your bonded cards for Uncanny Growth and add it to your hand.
ravenousMyconidNurturingStrain4.healOrMoveDamageHorror: Either heal that much damage/horror from Ravenous Myconid, or move that much damage/horror from investigators or _Ally_ assets at your location to Ravenous Myconid
ravenousMyconidNurturingStrain4.healFromMyconid: Heal that much damage/horror from Ravenous Myconid
ravenousMyconidNurturingStrain4.moveDamageToMyconid: Move that much damage/horror from investigator or Ally assets at your location to Ravenous Myconid

scientificTheory1.spendForCombat: {'{'}fast{'}'} Spend 1 resource: You get +1 {'{'}combat{'}'} for this skill test.
